opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: There is a massive, throbbing lump on the back of my neck. I can't move my head, and I've been getting chills all afternoon.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The lump has ballooned over the last two days, it's now got a yellow head on it and the pain is throbbing and constant, and I've started feeling shivery and unwell.

symptom_narrative.onset: a small tender red bump appeared on the nape of the neck about 4 days ago
symptom_narrative.duration: 4 days, but it has enlarged rapidly over the last 48 hours
symptom_narrative.character: started as a small sore bump, now a big firm hot red lump with a yellow-white pus head in the middle; throbbing and continuous
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really severe — throbbing pain, can barely turn my head
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the back of my neck, at the nape
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant now and getting worse; worst over the last day
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: moving or turning my head, and pressing on it
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: chills and shivers all afternoon, feeling generally run-down and unwell, the redness seems to be spreading out around the lump
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no previous lumps like this that I remember
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: neck movement is really restricted by the pain; I live alone and it's hard to manage

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; worried about coping if this gets worse overnight

objective_data_offered.value: a large tender red lump about 5 cm across on the back of the neck with a yellow-white pus-filled point in the middle; the redness spreads out a couple of centimetres past the lump
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-held phone camera; size and spread are the patient's own estimate, not a clinician measurement

objective_data_offered.value: feels hot and has had shivers and chills on and off all afternoon
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported sensation of fever; no home thermometer reading provided

objective_data_offered.value: can barely turn the head because of the pain and the bulk of the lump
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient reports mechanical restriction from the lump; not a formal neurological/meningism assessment
